title: Question Words
description: Master the essential Vietnamese question words for everyday conversations
intro: Vietnamese question words often go where the answer would go in the sentence. 'Bạn tên là gì?' literally means 'You name is WHAT?' — the question word sits in the answer's position.

questions.prompt: How do you say 'what' in Vietnamese?
questions.explanation: 'gì' = what. Goes after the verb: 'Bạn muốn gì?' = What do you want?

questions.prompt: How do you say 'who' in Vietnamese?
questions.explanation: 'ai' = who. Can be subject or object: 'Ai đó?' = Who's there? 'Bạn gặp ai?' = Who did you meet?

questions.prompt: How do you say 'where' in Vietnamese?
questions.explanation: 'ở đâu' = where. 'Bạn ở đâu?' = Where are you? / Where do you live?

questions.prompt: Cái này ___ tiền? (How much is this?)
questions.explanation: 'bao nhiêu' = how much/how many (large or unknown numbers)

questions.prompt: Bạn tên là ___? (What is your name?)
questions.explanation: 'gì' replaces the thing you're asking about: 'Your name is WHAT?'

questions.prompt: What is the difference between 'bao nhiêu' and 'mấy'?
questions.correct: 'mấy' is for small numbers (under 10), 'bao nhiêu' for any amount
options: 'mấy' is for small numbers (under 10), 'bao nhiêu' for any amount
questions.explanation: 'Mấy giờ rồi?' = What time is it? (expects 1-12). 'Bao nhiêu tiền?' = How much money? (could be any amount)
'Ai đó?' = Who's there? 'ai' as subject of the question
'ở đâu' goes at the end: 'Restaurant WHERE?' = Where is the restaurant?

questions.prompt: How do you ask 'How old are you?' in Vietnamese?
questions.explanation: Both work! 'mấy tuổi' is more common for children (expecting small number), 'bao nhiêu tuổi' for adults

questions.prompt: Bạn muốn ăn ___? (What do you want to eat?)
questions.explanation: 'gì' at the end = 'what': You want eat WHAT?

questions.prompt: How do you ask 'How many people?' for a small group (e.g., at a restaurant)?
questions.explanation: 'Mấy người?' is natural at a restaurant (expecting 1-10). 'Bao nhiêu người?' works for any number
Essential phrase: 'Toilet ở đâu?' = Where is the toilet?
'bao nhiêu tiền' = how much money. This is the #1 phrase for shopping

questions.prompt: Bạn từ ___ đến? (Where are you from?)
Put the question word in the right place: 'Your phone number is ___?'
questions.correct: Số điện thoại của bạn là gì?
options: Số điện thoại của bạn là gì?
Gì số điện thoại của bạn?
Số gì điện thoại của bạn?
questions.explanation: Question word goes where the answer would be: 'Number is WHAT?' → Số...là gì?
